sic • parvis • magna
Activity Notebook

Section 3 Activity

Participants generate a synthetic dataset, build the response matrix, train Beta4-IRT, inspect abilities and item parameters, and generate ICCs.

Notebook

  • Activity notebook: 03_02_activities.ipynb
  • Goal: inspect the individual item and connect the practical workflow back to the theory

What Participants Should Do

  • generate a synthetic dataset;
  • produce the response matrix;
  • fit the Beta4 model;
  • inspect ability, difficulty, discrimination, and ICCs.
Open activity notebook Back to section
